item.title: US lawmakers set to vote on war powers as Iran conflict widens
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
WASHINGTON, March 4 - Lawmakers in the U.S. Senate were set to begin voting on Wednesday on a bipartisan war powers resolution aiming to stop the military campaign against Iran and require that any hostilities against it be authorized by Congress.
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: After Iran’s warning, Europe fails to unite on war launched by US, Israel
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
The bloc is split over how to respond, but some EU members are rallying around the concept of mutual defence.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: ‘We were just praying’: Pakistani students recount escape from war-hit Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Iran hosts some 3,000 Pakistani students, who stare at an uncertain future after US-Israel attacks forced them to flee.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Analyst says interest in Epstein files plummeted after war on Iran launched
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Republican US Congressman Thomas Massie has said the war 'won’t make the Epstein files go away'.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Trump's Iran attack rattles Russian hardliners who call for Putin to double down on war in Ukraine
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Number of Iranian missiles and drones fired at Gulf countries
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
March 4 - Here are statistics released by Gulf defence ministries on drones and missiles that Iran has fired at their territories since the start of the U.S.-Israeli air war against Iran:
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: AI takes centre stage at Mobile World Congress in Barcelona
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
Beyond product showcases, attention at the event also turned to how artificial intelligence should be deployed transparently and responsibly as it becomes more embedded in networks and services.
Matched: ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3)

item.title: Lebanon sucked deeper into war as Hezbollah, Israel trade blows
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Israel's defence minister said he had authorised the military to take control of more positions in Lebanon.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iran war: Markets bet on brief conflict, but analysts warn of wider risks
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
Experts also warn that closure of the Strait of Hormuz would hit energy-intensive Asian economies hardest.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: How Iran fights an imposed war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Regime's strategy is not battlefield victory but raising the regional and global costs of any attempt to overthrow it.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Hundreds of drones target Kuwait, Iraq, Saudi Arabia, UAE amid Iran war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
IRGC says the attacks are among its 'first powerful steps' as it continues strikes on US assets in Gulf countries.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: IRGC says Iran in ‘complete control’ of Strait of Hormuz amid Trump threats
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
One-fifth of the global oil is shipped through the strait, which remains effectively closed amid US-Israeli war on Iran.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: How long can Israel sustain a military conflict with Iran?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Public support for Israel's war effort contrasts with doubts over its long-term military and economic sustainability.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: ‘War of narratives’: Disinformation surges as conflict roils Middle East
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Since US and Israeli strikes ignited a regional conflict, a parallel information war has erupted.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Netanyahu’s war alliance with Trump faces test as Iran crisis widens
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The two countries’ military campaigns have different objectives, a US official said.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iran crisis tests Trump standing with young men who helped power 2024 win
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
MANCHESTER, New Hampshire, March 4 - When Michael Leary learned the United States had struck Iran, he questioned whether the move honored the \"America First\" pledge that earned his vote for President Donald Trump and feared it could pull the country into another Middle East quagmire.
Matched: ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Russia blames Ukrainian drones for attack on LNG ship in Mediterranean
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
MOSCOW, March 4 - Russia's transport ministry on Wednesday accused Ukrainian naval drones of attacking a Russian liquefied natural gas carrier, the Arctic Metagaz, which caught fire in the Mediterranean a day earlier.
Matched: ministry(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Saudi Aramco’s Ras Tanura oil complex struck again by unknown projectile, sources say
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
There has been no disruption to supplies, according to the Energy Ministry.
Matched: ministry(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Hungary's opposition leads in polls, far-right party gains support
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
BUDAPEST, March 4 - Hungary's centre-right Tisza party leads Prime Minister Viktor Orban's governing Fidesz before an April 12 election, while the far-right Our Homeland is gaining support, two opinion polls showed on Wednesday.
Matched: election(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Photographer in dispute over Vietnam War ‘Napalm Girl’ image sues Netflix
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The photographer Nick Ut said the film, The Stringer, had damaged his reputation.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Pope Leo XIV issues warning to priests after noticing problematic trend in sermons: 'The brain needs to be used'
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US court convicts Japanese yakuza for trafficking nuclear material
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
He was also accused of trying to sell military-grade nuclear material, along with narcotics.
Matched: court(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Pakistan drop former captain Babar for ODI series in Bangladesh
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: Explainer-Are the US attacks on Iran legal?
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
March 4 - The U.S. military has joined Israel and attacked more than 1,000 targets in Iran and killed many of its top officials, including Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.
Matched: ai(+3)
